claims: The skill explicitly describes "bypassing standard API restrictions by impersonating the VS Code plugin environment" using specific headers and User-Agent strings to access internal Google endpoints not intended for general use. This constitutes unauthorized impersonation of another application/privileged environment to escalate access privileges beyond what standard APIs allow, which is a security violation regardless of the stated image generation purpose.

The skill explicitly describes "bypassing standard API restrictions by impersonating the VS Code plugin environment" using specific headers and User-Agent strings to access internal Google endpoints not intended for general use. This constitutes unauthorized impersonation of another application/privileged environment to escalate access privileges beyond what standard APIs allow, which is a security violation regardless of the stated image generation purpose.
